$comment: Manual dates for Truro Vineyards. Their /events-calendar/ page is image-only with ticketing on ExploreTock + FareHarbor (both Cloudflare-protected, no scrape). Seeded by OCR'ing the 2026 summer schedule flyers — re-OCR or update manually when the venue rolls out a new season. All events at 11 Shore Road, North Truro EXCEPT the Schooner Hindu sailings which leave from 10 W MacMillan Pier, Provincetown.

events.title: Wine & Dine Dinner
events.description: 5-course tasting menu paired with South Hollow Spirits cocktails & Truro Vineyards wines. Filled with local food, art, music, and more. $85/person. Tickets via ExploreTock.
